subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Though ye be the target of the arrows of oppression, praised be God, ye are intoxicated with longing for the countenance of that Lord of fidelity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء هر چند هدف سهام جفااید الحمد لله مشتاق روی آن میر وفا سرمست
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
